{"analysis":"The terminal has multiple processes running and commands got concatenated. Need to kill all Python processes properly first.","plan":"Send Ctrl+C to stop, then kill all Python processes, then verify clean state.","commands":[{"keystrokes":"C-c
","duration":1.0},{"keystrokes":"kill -9 $(pgrep -f python3)
","duration":2.0},{"keystrokes":"ps aux | grep python
","duration":0.5}]}
